name: PLAN

pageMatrix.intent: brand + category + local convert (call / directions / order)
schema: Menu JSON-LD (from menu.json via graph projection)

foldedPages.reason: Engine restaurant archetype (v0.x) injects only the `/` route. Full menu lives in src/data/menu.json — validated, emitted as machine-readable Menu schema for AI/search, and surfaced in llms.txt. A standalone /menu HTML route is a documented future extension, NOT built here (would require ejecting the engine integration, which is explicitly out of scope per 'build as intended').
Family Deal ($49.99), Captain's Family Meal ($59.99), combo dinners surfaced as on-page offers + schema.
Single-location business; NAP + map link belong on the landing and in schema.

requiredCroBlocks.purpose: single H1 + call-first dual CTA above the fold
family/party deals as scannable offers + Offer schema
made-fresh-to-order, variety, hours, deals, locally owned, delivery

imageSlotPlan.note: Need real logo from owner; placeholder mark generated in imagery phase if none supplied.
Fried seafood + chicken spread, nautical mood.
Prefer a REAL photo of the actual plate; do not fabricate a specific dish as if it were theirs.

minimumPageCountRationale: The engine's restaurant archetype ships a single injected `/` route by design; a richly-structured converting landing page plus machine-readable Menu/LocalBusiness schema is the intended v0.x output and is sufficient for a single-location counter-service restaurant. Additional HTML routes are a future engine capability, not a content gap. No thin/doorway matrix pages are created.

checklist.note: Single `/` landing accepted as engine-intended output
5 CRO blocks mapped to site.json fields
Full menu planned as data + Menu schema, not a hand-built route
5 image slots declared; real-photo slots marked blocked-awaiting-photos

checklist.reason: Standalone /menu, /deals, /visit HTML routes deferred — engine injects only `/`; building them would require ejecting the integration (out of scope: build as intended, no old-work copy)
